text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #5)

Thank you! I have much more for ghostscript, because there are many outdated ports. Can you have a look at them as well: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?email1=michael.osipov%40siemens.com&emailassigned_to1=1&emailreporter1=1&emailtype1=exact&list_id=593966&order=changeddate%20DESC%2Copendate&query_format=advanced&resolution=---
